assumptions: Backfill work should start from the Domain Level Batches screen because that screen already tracks the current domain evaluation.
A backfill should only attach to an existing domain evaluation when the scope category and temperature still match that evaluation.
A model backfill should only allow model IDs that are already part of the target evaluation's original model set so the evaluation metadata stays honest.
discovery.summary: Add a supported way to backfill missing model coverage into an existing domain evaluation so reruns stay attached to the original launch instead of becoming orphan evaluations.
acceptance_criteria: The feature blocks unsafe attachments when the requested temperature, scope category, or model set do not match the target evaluation.
